fastRender.advice: 3 render-blocking resources delay first paint. Inline critical CSS and defer non-critical scripts.

avoidRenderBlocking.advice: Eliminate render-blocking stylesheets by inlining above-the-fold CSS.

unusedCss.advice: Reduce unused CSS by tree-shaking and removing unused selectors.

cacheHeaders.advice: Add Cache-Control: max-age=31536000, immutable to hashed static assets.
